title: AI Adoption in Canada's Creative Industry (2026 Study)
description: A comprehensive research study on how Canadian creative agencies, particularly in Montreal, are adopting AI tools like Midjourney and Firefly.

schemas.headline: AI Adoption in Canada's Creative Industry (2026 Study)
schemas.description: A deep dive into how AI is reshaping the Canadian creative landscape, with a focus on Montreal. Analyzing tools, hiring impact, and agency pricing models.
